Recognition Name
field.value: United Nations University Institute for Water, Environment and Health Medal

field.label: Description
field.value: Awarded for exceptional personal commitment to the success of the United Nations International Year of Glaciers' Preservation 2025 Initiative in Canada.

bilingual.english: Awarded for exceptional personal commitment to the success of the United Nations International Year of Glaciers' Preservation 2025 Initiative in Canada.

field.label: Recognition Name
field.value: BC Parks Volunteer of the Year Award

field.label: Description
field.value: Annual recognition for outstanding service to BC Parks. Awarded for work on the Mount Robson trail rebuild and redesign following the 2021 Heat Dome event.

bilingual.english: Annual recognition for outstanding service to BC Parks. Awarded for work on the Mount Robson trail rebuild and redesign following the 2021 Heat Dome event.
glacier change, earth system science
